subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou knowest and seest how the waves of tribulation surge one after another upon 'Abdu'l-Bahá and the flames of trials rise high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تعلم و تری امواج البلاء تتلاطم علی عبدالبهاء تتری وجنت نار اعلام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
